items.title: Notre Dame Football is getting a different type of Bus treatment
items.summary: Normally when you think about Notre Dame Football and a bus, you automatically think about Jerome Bettis — as you should. However, in the year of our Lord 2026, in the world of college football, the word “bus” is most often concerning the wild,y popular “Bussin With The Boys” podcast with former Nebraska linebacker, Will […]

items.title: How many Notre Dame players will be selected in the NFL Draft?
items.summary: ESPN’s Matt Miller recently put out a 7 round mock NFL Draft, and he has six Notre Dame Football players selected in the first 190 picks. Round 1, Pick 4: RB Jeremiyah Love — Tennessee TitansRound 2, Pick 49: RB Jadarian Price — Minnesota VikingsRound 3, Pick 71: WR Malachi Fields — Washington CommandersRound 4, […]

items.title: Everything you need to know about how Notre Dame Football is doing this spring
items.summary: The Notre Dame Fighting Irish football team now has six practices under its belt during the spring practice season, and there are some updates, notes, and thoughts we need to talk about.
